terminology.recall: fraction of labeled (seeded) issues the model correctly identified
terminology.precision_proxy: fraction of model-raised issues that align with a labeled expectation; surplus = surprise issues
terminology.control_violation: control-fixture (deliberately clean page) was flagged with critical or excess warning issues
terminology.wcag_aa_text_contrast: 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large (>=18pt or 14pt bold)

levels.summary: One isolated, glaringly obvious seeded fault per fixture. A competent vision model should detect every fault.

fixtures.label: Primary CTA uses light gray text on a white background — clearly fails WCAG AA contrast (≥4.5:1).

raw.summary: Heuristic mock review (no vision LLM configured). Capture decoded successfully (1532 bytes compressed). Configure ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, GOOGLE_API_KEY or run Ollama locally for real analysis.

issues.issue: Primary CTA does not visually dominate the hero section.
issues.why_it_matters: Users may not immediately know what action to take, lowering conversion.
issues.fix: Increase the CTA's color contrast and font weight; reduce competing elements nearby.

issues.issue: Gaps between feature cards look uneven across rows.
issues.why_it_matters: Inconsistent rhythm reads as unpolished and reduces perceived quality.
issues.fix: Standardize on a single spacing token (e.g., gap-6) and verify column gutters match.

issues.issue: Body text appears smaller than 16px on desktop.
issues.why_it_matters: Reduces readability for users over 35 and on high-DPI screens.
issues.fix: Bump body to 16px / line-height 1.5; reserve 14px for captions only.

strengths: Page rendered without errors and the screenshot was captured cleanly.
Layout fits within the target viewport without horizontal scroll.

fixtures.label: Body copy rendered at 9px — far below the 16px sustained-reading threshold.

next_actions.description: Model failed to surface a warning-severity contrast/color finding on fixture "low-contrast-cta". Seeded fault: Primary CTA uses light gray text on a white background — clearly fails WCAG AA contrast (≥4.5:1).
next_actions.expected_signal: An issue with category ∈ {contrast, color}, severity ≥ warning, mentioning any of: cta, button, sign in, primary, contrast, wcag.
next_actions.suggested_fix: Tighten the system prompt for this UX dimension. Add an explicit checkpoint and one positive/negative example. If the dimension already has a checkpoint, raise its priority and require the model to evaluate it before producing the summary.

next_actions.description: Model failed to surface a warning-severity typography finding on fixture "tiny-body-text". Seeded fault: Body copy rendered at 9px — far below the 16px sustained-reading threshold.
next_actions.expected_signal: An issue with category ∈ {typography}, severity ≥ warning, mentioning any of: body, text, size, small, legibil, readab.
next_actions.suggested_fix: Tighten the system prompt for this UX dimension. Add an explicit checkpoint and one positive/negative example. If the dimension already has a checkpoint, raise its priority and require the model to evaluate it before producing the summary.

next_actions.description: Model failed to surface a warning-severity spacing/alignment finding on fixture "cramped-spacing". Seeded fault: All padding and margin removed — content slammed together with zero breathing room.
next_actions.expected_signal: An issue with category ∈ {spacing, alignment}, severity ≥ warning, mentioning any of: spacing, padding, margin, cramp, breathing, whitespace.
next_actions.suggested_fix: Tighten the system prompt for this UX dimension. Add an explicit checkpoint and one positive/negative example. If the dimension already has a checkpoint, raise its priority and require the model to evaluate it before producing the summary.

next_actions.description: Model failed to surface a warning-severity responsiveness/spacing finding on fixture "mobile-overflow". Seeded fault: 1100px-wide pricing table forces horizontal scrolling on a 375px viewport.
next_actions.expected_signal: An issue with category ∈ {responsiveness, spacing}, severity ≥ warning, mentioning any of: overflow, scroll, horizontal, mobile, responsive, table.
next_actions.suggested_fix: Tighten the system prompt for this UX dimension. Add an explicit checkpoint and one positive/negative example. If the dimension already has a checkpoint, raise its priority and require the model to evaluate it before producing the summary.

next_actions.description: Model failed to surface a warning-severity consistency/interaction finding on fixture "inconsistent-buttons". Seeded fault: Five identical 'Save' buttons rendered with five wildly different styles — no consistent button language.
next_actions.expected_signal: An issue with category ∈ {consistency, interaction}, severity ≥ warning, mentioning any of: button, consist, style, save, system, varied.
next_actions.suggested_fix: Tighten the system prompt for this UX dimension. Add an explicit checkpoint and one positive/negative example. If the dimension already has a checkpoint, raise its priority and require the model to evaluate it before producing the summary.

next_actions.description: Model failed to surface a warning-severity content/interaction finding on fixture "unclear-cta-copy". Seeded fault: Every CTA label is generic ('Click here', 'Submit', 'OK') — no verb-object pairing.
next_actions.expected_signal: An issue with category ∈ {content, interaction}, severity ≥ warning, mentioning any of: click here, label, copy, vague, generic, verb.
next_actions.suggested_fix: Tighten the system prompt for this UX dimension. Add an explicit checkpoint and one positive/negative example. If the dimension already has a checkpoint, raise its priority and require the model to evaluate it before producing the summary.

next_actions.description: Model failed to surface a warning-severity interaction/consistency/color finding on fixture "disabled-no-distinction". Seeded fault: Disabled buttons are styled identically to active buttons — no opacity, no greying, no cursor change.
next_actions.expected_signal: An issue with category ∈ {interaction, consistency, color}, severity ≥ warning, mentioning any of: disabled, state, active, distinguish, affordance, feedback.
next_actions.suggested_fix: Tighten the system prompt for this UX dimension. Add an explicit checkpoint and one positive/negative example. If the dimension already has a checkpoint, raise its priority and require the model to evaluate it before producing the summary.

next_actions.description: Model failed to surface a warning-severity loading_state/content/interaction finding on fixture "empty-state-missing". Seeded fault: Empty list with no empty-state message, illustration, or call to action — user lands on a blank box.
next_actions.expected_signal: An issue with category ∈ {loading_state, content, interaction}, severity ≥ warning, mentioning any of: empty, blank, placeholder, zero, starter, first run.
next_actions.suggested_fix: Tighten the system prompt for this UX dimension. Add an explicit checkpoint and one positive/negative example. If the dimension already has a checkpoint, raise its priority and require the model to evaluate it before producing the summary.

next_actions.description: Model failed to surface a warning-severity responsiveness/interaction finding on fixture "tap-target-too-small". Seeded fault: Toolbar icons rendered at 18×18px and packed tightly together — far below the 48×48 mobile tap target (Fitts/Material).
next_actions.expected_signal: An issue with category ∈ {responsiveness, interaction}, severity ≥ warning, mentioning any of: tap, target, touch, small, icon, 48.
next_actions.suggested_fix: Tighten the system prompt for this UX dimension. Add an explicit checkpoint and one positive/negative example. If the dimension already has a checkpoint, raise its priority and require the model to evaluate it before producing the summary.
